narrative:
Cincinnati 1-D (precinct in Hamilton County) has 879 registered voters, with 60.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.9 percentage points.
